urdu transliteration text: Aaja Asgher ki jagah meri Sakina soja
english translation text: Come sleep where Asghar used to, oh my Sakina

urdu transliteration text:
Jaagti Maa ne kaha meri Sakina soja
A restless mother said,
sleep my Sakina
Jo tujhey khouf hai shayad main usse kam kardoon
english translation text: Maybe I can reduce the fear that you have

urdu transliteration text:
Aaja aankhon pe tere naade ali dam pardoon
Come, let me recite naade ali on your eyes

Dur kyun baithi hai aa meri sakina soja
come sleep my Sakina
english translation text: Why are you sitting so far,

urdu transliteration text: Baap ke sine pe aadat hai tujhe sone ki
english translation text: You’ve gotten used to sleeping on your father’s chest

urdu transliteration text: Meri ghodi tere kaabil toh nahi hai phir bhi
english translation text: My lap isn’t the same for you, but still

urdu transliteration text:
Hai mere dil ki sada meri Sakina soja
come sleep my Sakina
english translation text: It’s the cry of my heart,

urdu transliteration text: Qaid khaane me jo aa jayenge tere baba
english translation text: If your father comes to the prison

urdu transliteration text:
Khud utha dungi tujhe shaana hila kar tera
I’ll wake you up myself,
Accha kuch der zara meri sakina soja
english translation text: Just for a little while, come sleep my Sakina

urdu transliteration text: Mujhse dekha nahi jaata yeh tera dard e jigar
english translation text: I can’t bear to see the pain in your heart

urdu transliteration text: Ye batate huwe acha to nahi lagta magar
english translation text: It hurts for me to tell you this, but

urdu transliteration text:
Ab na aayenge chacha meri Sakina soja
Your uncle isn’t coming back again, come sleep my Sakina
